nodes.rationale: Supported constructs may normalize after a visual edit.

nodes.rationale: Remote downloads are disabled by default pending workspace-trust checks.

nodes.rationale: Startup, typing latency, memory, rendering, and install metrics were not measured because E2E was blocked.

nodes.label: VS Code updater mutex
nodes.rationale: Local updater mutex blocked the real VS Code E2E run.

nodes.label: Marketplace publisher ID
nodes.rationale: A real publisher ID is required; a placeholder intentionally blocks publication.
